Off Calendar Mar-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:

PLAINTIFF HELEN CRAFT AS AN INDIVIDUAL, HELEN CRAFT, AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST TO THE ESTATE OF WILLIAM CRAFT, JR'S Motion To Compel The Production Of Documents At Deposition Nos 1 And Nos 3-13 is off calendar. A Notice of Settlement was filed on February 19, 2013. Brad Kaplan, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Set For Trial On Apr-02-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS BRIAN LEUNG, VALLEY OF CALIFORNIA INC'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.
Appearances: Alex Merchant of the Tobener Law Center (504.2165) for plaintiff and responding party; no other appearances.
The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Overruled in its entirety. The one year statute of limitations of CCP 340(a) and Menefee v. Ostawari (1991) 228 Cal.App.3d 239 does not apply to this case. Plaintiff's causes of action are not predicated on the violation of the rent ordinance. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-03-2012 Off Calendar
